name: BeMetals Corp.
summary: BeMetals Corp. explores for, develops, and produces precious and base metal properties. The company primarily has an option to acquire approximately 72% interest in the Pangeni copper project, which covers a total area of 575.68 square kilometers located in Zambia; and 100% interest in the South Mountain zinc-silver-gold-copper development project located in Southwest Idaho. It also holds interest in the Kazan Gold Project located in Japan. The company was formerly known as BQ Metals Corp. and changed its name to BeMetals Corp. in April 2018. BeMetals Corp. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
